digital_sobriety_practices: Auto-scaling to zero outside business hours
Green IT hardware procurement policy (min 5-year lifecycle)

principles: Human oversight mandatory for all AI recommendations
No discriminatory outputs - quarterly bias testing
Transparency of data sources to end users
Right to contest any AI-generated suggestion

high_availability_vs_energy.description: 99.9% uptime SLA requires warm standby nodes that consume energy continuously
high_availability_vs_energy.standard_resolution: Low-power standby mode with <90s wake-up; accepted as SLA-compatible

on_premise_vs_green_energy.description: On-premise servers powered by client electricity grid, which may not be 100% renewable
on_premise_vs_green_energy.standard_resolution: Recommend client subscribes to renewable energy Guarantee of Origin certificate

performance_vs_model_size.description: Larger models deliver higher accuracy but consume significantly more energy
performance_vs_model_size.standard_resolution: Prefer quantised mid-size models (7B–13B) with fine-tuning over large unoptimised models
